agent_runs.outcome: submitted first try - ZERO validation errors (38 claims incl. generated IN/OUT, 17 deps, 5 bug candidates)

ACCEPT (55/55 coverage: 34 supported, 4 partially_supported all in the out-of-range-citation class, 17/17 deps confirmed; counted every count claim mechanically incl. detecting 2 comment-only 'FOR TESTING' matches)

notes: Cheapest total of ALL configs (~252k tokens) AND the only author (with fable-opus) to pass deterministic validation on the first try - zero format errors.
Richest artifact: 38 judgeable claims (vs 19-29 for the others) and 5 evidenced bug candidates, at a token cost comparable to opus and 4x less than sonnet-sonnet's churned total.

The fable judge separated falsehood from citation-coverage: its 4 partially_supported were 'true in source but the cited range does not prove it' - it verified each one in the source before downgrading rather than rejecting.

Dynamic-name dependencies (CALL_V1_PING via variable, ZABAPGIT via (c_tabname)) were correctly claimed by the author and confirmed by the judge through the literal assignments - the hardest dependency class in the contract.
